mapper.select: SELECT * FROM notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'pending'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification (user_id, title, content, type, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{type}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE notification SET status=#{status} WHERE id=#{id}
UPDATE notification SET status='sent', sent_at=NOW(), send_result=#{sendResult} WHERE id=#{id}
UPDATE notification SET status='failed', send_result=#{sendResult} WHERE id=#{id}
